name: Fat-Free Chocolate Therapy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, add egg whites.
2. Add sugar and stir well.
3. Add vanilla and stir well.
4. Add flour, cocoa, salt, and baking powder; stir until combined.
5. Fold in marshmallow cream until all lumps are incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into a lightly coated 9x9 inch pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
